completed_slices.summary: Added docs/workflow-invariants.md covering daemon run lifetime, slice lifecycle, worker supervision, cancellation/resume, verification gates, progress ownership, artifacts/handoff behavior, and release/tag safety. Linked it from README.md and the Khazad-Doom skill without changing CLI or daemon behavior.
acceptance_status: Documented daemon-owned run lifetime and no hidden global workflow timeout.
Documented dependency ordering, worker worktrees, worker commits, serial integration, checkpoints, and repair-before-gate behavior.
Documented worker attempt history, at-least-once semantics, liveness versus output, advisory quiet warnings, and explicit attempt timeout policy.
Documented cancellation, verification/gate timeouts, progress/status/monitor ownership, artifacts/handoffs, and release/tag safety.
Linked invariants document from README.md and skills/khazad-doom/SKILL.md.
assumptions: Documentation-only slice; no CLI, daemon status JSON, monitor, handoff, artifact, remote mutation, or timeout behavior was changed.

completed_slices.summary: Extracted workflow gate execution into src/workflow/gate.rs and shell command execution into src/workflow/shell.rs. Manager now delegates worker verification and integration gate command execution through typed internal seam results while retaining orchestration, repair, checkpointing, retries, and state transitions. Added unit coverage for gate success, failure, timeout, cancellation, and shell progress/cancellation/timeout behavior; updated workflow invariants docs.
acceptance_status: Extracted integration gate and shell command execution behind compact crate-internal workflow modules returning typed results.
Preserved cwd/env handling, sh -c execution, output tailing, cancellation, timeout, process-group cleanup, progress reporting, command result artifacts, and error text semantics.
Kept Manager responsible for lifecycle ordering, retries, repair decisions, checkpointing, and state transitions.
No public CLI, daemon IPC, status JSON, monitor, slice schema, handoff, or repo config contract changes.
Added focused unit tests for success, failure, timeout, and cancellation-sensitive behavior.
Updated docs/workflow-invariants.md to describe the manager versus gate/shell seam responsibilities.

integration_repair.summary: Integration repair pass found no cross-slice or verification breakage; worktree remains clean.

findings.description: Merged integration branch verified successfully; no repair commit needed.
